calendar.matters:
ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Report Of Successor Trustee Re. Trust Assets
Off Calendar Dec-08-2015 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status On Filing Report Of Successor Trustee Re. Trust Assets
Off Calendar Nov-24-2015 Continued To Dec-08-15 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Petition To Appoint Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Sep-28-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jon Vaught for and with (petitioner) Leamon McGriff, III. Glenda McGriff in Propria Persona.

The Court stated that it has received the objection and response and will hear additional argument. Ms. McGriff stated that she is one of the trustees of the estate, that she has a copy of the will stating that she is to be successor trustee, that she has a copy of the trust document with the trustees on it, that she was not notified until 8/7/15 of this petition, that the petition to distribute the estate of Leamon McGriff Jr. was on 8/3/15, that she has been investigating and found documents that indicated that a property was transferred or sold to Mr. McGriff Jr. and then sold back to the trust and that she has concerns regarding that the assets will be lost, that she has documents from McGriff Jr. and that she has documents and letters from another trustee who had requested information. Mr. Vaught reported that there is one asset left, that the petitioner and his cousin Malik are the only two beneficiaries left, that the trust names successor trustees but they are all gone and that there is no evidence provided that Ms. McGriff is a beneficiary. Ms. McGriff stated that she had attempted to file documents that would support her as successor trustee but had issues with filing. The Court stated that the trust document is before the court and it is not sure what other document she could have. Ms. McGriff responded that the trust document she received is altered, that it is missing text, that there are two signatures of the same person, that she thinks the alteration removed her name as successor trustee and that she has information that there was an annuity in the trust. The Court asked why she did not raise these issues in 1997. Ms. McGriff stated that a cousin raised the issues and that she received a letter from Mr. McGriff regarding litigation. The Court will allow Ms. McGriff until 9/8/15 to file any supplemental information she has, Mr. Vaught has until 9/15/15 to respond to that information and the petition to appoint a successor trustee will be under submission as of September 15, 2015.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Leslie Gomez. Bailiff: Deputy Kabasares. (Not Reported)
